title: Iran oil shock stirs memories of 1997 Asian Financial Crisis — but here’s why history may not repeat itself
summary_full: The Hormuz disruption is hammering Asian economies with surging energy costs and weakening currencies, but a repeat of the crisis three decades ago is unlikely.
summary_public: The Hormuz disruption is hammering Asian economies with surging energy costs and weakening currencies, but a repeat of the crisis three decades ago is unlikely.
